title: rubus eversii
intro: Rubus eversii, also known as the Evers' raspberry, is a species of bramble in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help protect against cell damage and reduce pain. The health benefits of Rubus eversii are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Rubus eversii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although the optimal preparation methods and dosages are not yet well established.
